name: Les Traiteurs Engages
description: Plateforme de mise en relation traiteurs engages

SECRET_KEY.description: Application secret key (min 32 chars). Generate with: python -c 'import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))'

SECURE_COOKIES.description: Set to true — Scalingo terminates TLS at the router

TRUST_PROXY_HEADERS.description: Set to true — Scalingo's router is the reverse proxy

ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Email for the bootstrap admin account

ADMIN_INITIAL_PASSWORD.description: Password for the bootstrap admin (leave empty to skip)

STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.description: Stripe API secret key (leave empty to disable Stripe)

S3_BUCKET.description: S3 bucket name for file uploads (required for persistent storage)

S3_ENDPOINT_URL.description: S3 endpoint URL (required for Scaleway/MinIO, omit for AWS)

S3_PUBLIC_URL.description: Public base URL for uploaded files (e.g. https://bucket.s3.fr-par.scw.cloud)
